title: SMS Setup Alphanumeric Country Registration
summary: Testing selective sender ID registration for user-selected countries only versus auto-registering all available alphanumeric countries to improve UX and reduce confusion.
hypothesis: By registering sender IDs only for user-selected alphanumeric countries (instead of all available countries by default), we expect to improve the user experience and reduce confusion without negatively impacting activation metrics.
notes: Follow-on experiment to Independent Alphanumerics Sender IDs rollout. 50/50 split for companies requesting at least one alphanumeric country. PRD: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Q2sgs5fv8m0Uaf09-Y74u0uaKo0ilhmrmtW8VEg0Zv0/edit?tab=t.0PRD
control_description: Current behavior where sender IDs are registered for all available alphanumeric countries automatically
treatment_description: Sender IDs registered only for the alphanumeric countries that were user-selected in the SMS Setup Workflow
